news.headline: ALS specialists diagnose patients twice as fast as general neurologists. New thinkALS™ tool helps providers identify and refer patients quicker. ARLINGTON, Va., Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: An innovative tool called thinkALS™ has been introduced to assist providers in identifying and referring patients more efficiently. Research indicates that individuals seen in general neurology clinics may experience delays in receiving an ALS diagnosis, taking up to twice as long compared to those seen in specialist clinics. This groundbreaking tool aims to bridge this gap and streamline the process of identifying and referring ALS patients promptly. The development of thinkALS™ could potentially significantly reduce the time taken for patients to receive a proper diagnosis and access necessary care. The tool's implementation is expected to contribute to expedited referrals, ultimately improving the overall management and outcomes for individuals affected by ALS. The release of thinkALS™ promises to revolutionize the diagnostic pathway for ALS, potentially leading to more timely interventions and support for patients.

news.headline: Caterpillar Inc.'s board of directors maintains $1.41 quarterly dividend per share, payable on Feb. 20, 2025.
news.summary: In Irving, Texas, on December 10, 2024, the Board of Directors of Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT) decided to keep the quarterly dividend unchanged at $1.41 per share of common stock. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on February 20, 2025, to shareholders of record at the end of business hours.

news.headline: BODi launches "Belle Vitale" by Autumn Calabrese, a 12-week program for women's hormone health. NYSE: BODI.
news.summary: The Beachbody Company, Inc. (NYSE: BODI) based in El Segundo, California, has introduced a new program called "Belle Vitale," developed by Autumn Calabrese, a fitness and nutrition expert. The program aims to assist women in dealing with problems related to hormone imbalances at any age. Autumn Calabrese is an IIN Certified Hormone Health Coach. The initiative takes a holistic approach to address issues and symptoms arising from hormonal imbalances as per a Northwell Health article.

news.headline: Talen Energy increases term loan B financing from $600 million to $850 million, repurchases common stock.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Talen Energy Corporation, traded as TLN on NASDAQ, revealed an increase in its incremental Term Loan B credit facility from $600 million to $850 million. This initiative, referred to as the "Upsize," signifies a significant expansion in the financial resources available to the Company.

news.headline: Nasdaq reports end-of-month short interest in 3,065 stocks at 11.8B shares as of Nov 29, 2024, up from 11.97B on Nov 15.
news.summary: In New York on December 10, 2024, it was reported that short interest in 3,065 Nasdaq Global MarketSM securities reached 11,857,580,215 shares at the end of the settlement date of November 29, 2024. This marked a decrease from 11,973,515,318 shares in 3,070 Global Market issues recorded for the previous settlement date of November 15, 2024. The short interest calculated at the end of November signifies 2.36 days, showing an increase from the 2.25 days reported during the prior reporting period.

news.headline: Globalink Investment Inc. extends business combination deadline to Jan 9, 2025, with $60,000 deposited, 18th extension since IPO.
news.summary: In New York City on December 10, 2024, Globalink Investment Inc. (Nasdaq: GLLI, GLLIW, GLLIR, GLLIU) disclosed that it has placed $60,000 (referred to as the “Extension Payment”) into its Trust Account held by Continental Stock Transfer and Trust Company. This deposit effectively extends the deadline for its initial business combination from December 9, 2024, to January 9, 2025. This move marks the eighteenth extension since the completion of the Company’s initial public offering on December 9, 2021. Additionally, the Company's governing documents allow for up to six extensions, and this is the first one utilized within that limit.

news.headline: Apollomics Inc. regains Nasdaq compliance by maintaining minimum bid price of $1.00/share, ensuring listing as APLM.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Apollomics Inc. (Nasdaq: APLM), a Foster City-based clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing treatments for challenging cancers, disclosed that it had received a notification from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC. The notification confirmed that the company complied with the rule necessitating a minimum closing bid price of $1.00 per share as outlined in Nasdaq Rule 5550(a)(2). Consequently, Nasdaq decided to maintain the listing of the Company’s Class A ordinary shares ("Class A Ordinary Shares") on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the ticker symbol "APLM."

news.headline: Orchid Island Capital declares December dividend of $0.12 per share, paid on Jan 30, 2025, record date Dec 31, 2024.
news.summary: Orchid Island Capital, Inc. disclosed today in Vero Beach, Florida, that its Board of Directors approved a monthly cash dividend for December 2024. Each shareholder of record as of December 31, 2024, will receive $0.12 per share, with the payment scheduled for January 30, 2025. The ex-dividend date is also December 31, 2024. The next common stock dividend declaration is set to be announced on January 8, 2025. The Company's ticker on the New York Stock Exchange is ORC.

news.headline: Scott Maskin is appointed as CEO of SUNation Energy.
Phillips Edison & Company predicts retail trends for 2025 for ICSC New York, a premiere commercial real estate event.
news.summary: In Cincinnati on December 10, 2024, Phillips Edison & Company, Inc. (Nasdaq: PECO), a prominent owner and operator of prime grocery-anchored neighborhood shopping centers, unveiled its projected retail trends for 2025 at ICSC New York. PECO, a leading company in the industry, shared key insights at the event.

news.headline: Yellen discussed with Bessent post nomination; shared fiscal regrets.
ACM Research enhances ALD portfolio with furnace tools for 300mm semiconductor production.
news.summary: State-of-the-art Thermal and Plasma-Enhanced Atomic Layer Deposition (ALD) furnace tools have been approved for use in mass production of 300mm semiconductor wafers. These tools are equipped to handle high-volume manufacturing, reflecting the industry's shift towards larger wafer sizes to accommodate increased production demands. The qualification of these tools signifies a major advancement in semiconductor manufacturing technology, with the potential to significantly improve efficiency and output.

news.headline: Harvey Stern recognized as Inner Circle Lifetime for contributions to High-Level Hospitality and Event Management.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on December 10, 2024, Harvey Stern was recognized in The Inner Circle as an Inner Circle Lifetime member for his significant contributions to High-Level Hospitality and Event Management. Stern, a prominent figure in the industry, has made a lasting impact with his expertise and dedication.

news.headline: Myriad Genetics adds Mark S. Davis to Board, now has nine members, up from eight.
news.summary: Myriad Genetics has appointed Mark S. Davis to its Board of Directors, increasing the Board's size from eight to nine members. This change is effective immediately.

news.headline: Kronos AT offers up to 50% off air purification products for Cyber Monday and exclusive deals throughout December.
news.summary: Enjoy a stress-free holiday season this year with Kronos' stellar Cyber Monday sale on state-of-the-art air purification technology. Benefit from unbeatable deals on high-quality products while ensuring a breath of fresh air in your space. Additionally, exclusive savings are available throughout December, providing further opportunities to invest in a healthier environment. Don't miss out on this incredible offer to secure top-notch air purifiers at discounted prices. Breathe easy and stay safe with Kronos this holiday season!

news.headline: Teresa A. Lee recognized as Pinnacle Professional Member in Inner Circle of Excellence for Leadership & Customer Development.
news.summary: In Fairview, North Carolina on December 10, 2024, Teresa A. Lee was recognized in The Inner Circle as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for her significant achievements in Leadership & Customer Development. Lee, a renowned leader, was honored for her outstanding contributions in this field.

news.headline: Sandra Jean Robinson, DO named Pinnacle Lifetime Member by The Inner Circle for contributions to Osteopathic Medicine.
news.summary: In the town of Conrad, Montana on December 10, 2024, Sandra Jean Robinson, DO was highlighted in The Inner Circle as a distinguished figure. She has been recognized as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member for her remarkable work in Osteopathic Medicine and Mentorship. As a committed Family Physician, she has shown dedication and passion in her field, making significant contributions.

news.headline: Ingram Micro wins 2 AWS awards for 2024 - Global Distributor Partner of the Year & LATAM Innovation Partner.
news.summary: In a recent announcement made in Las Vegas, Ingram Micro was awarded two prestigious titles by AWS. They were recognized as both AWS' Global Distributor Partner of the Year and Innovation Partner of the Year for the LATAM region. This marks a significant achievement for Ingram Micro, showcasing their excellence and leadership in the industry.

news.headline: Stitch Fix reports Q1 FY 2025 results, ended Nov 2, 2024. Leading online styling service.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Stitch Fix, Inc. (NASDAQ: SFIX), a top online personal styling service, revealed its financial outcomes for the initial quarter of fiscal year 2025, wrapping up on November 2, 2024.

news.headline: COON (Maine Coon Cat) to be listed on XT Exchange with COON/USDT trading pair in Innovation Zone on Dec. 02, 2024.
news.summary: Victoria Mahe, Seychelles on December 2, 2024 - In exciting news, COON, a Maine Coon Cat cryptocurrency, is set to be listed on XT Exchange. Traders can look forward to the COON/USDT trading pair being accessible within the Innovation Zone dedicated to MEMEs and WEB3.0. Make sure to mark your calendars for the official launch of this new listing.

news.headline: Sportsman's Warehouse Holdings, Inc. announces Q3 2024 financial results, ending on Nov 2, 2024.
news.summary: In West Jordan, Utah, on December 10, 2024, Sportsman's Warehouse Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: SPWH) shared its third-quarter financial performance for the periods ending November 2, 2024. The company, operating in the retail sector, revealed details about its earnings for the thirteen-week and thirty-nine-week durations.

news.headline: Domo partners with Richey May to offer data solutions to mortgage brokers, benefiting over 80 clients.
news.summary: A collaboration between Domo (Nasdaq: DOMO) and Richey May, an advisory and accounting firm, was unveiled in Silicon Slopes, Utah. In a recent announcement, it was disclosed that Domo's data and AI platform will be leveraged to offer tailored data-driven insights for Richey May's mortgage banking consulting arm. Over 80 mortgage bankers within Richey May's clientele have already utilized Domo's platform to access valuable insights to enhance their operations. With over four decades of experience in the mortgage sector, Richey May is known for its comprehensive advisory and technological services.

news.headline: Critical Metals Corp appoints Steven R Parkes as new CFO, replacing Melissa Chapman. Carolyn Trabuco steps down as Director.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Critical Metals Corp. (Nasdaq: CRML) appointed Mr. Steven R Parkes as the new Chief Financial Officer after Ms. Melissa Chapman transitioned from the role on December 9, 2024. Critical Metals Corp. is a prominent mining development company specializing in critical metals and minerals crucial for electrification and advanced technologies in Europe and its western allies. Additionally, Ms. Carolyn Trabuco has resigned from her position as an Independent Director of the Board.

news.headline: Beyond Oil to present at The Benchmark Company’s investor conference in NYC on Dec. 11, 2024. Company focuses on reducing health risks in fried food, lowering costs, and enhancing sustainability.
news.summary: Beyond Oil Ltd., a food-tech innovation company based in Vancouver, BC and KIBBUTZ YIFAT, Israel, revealed plans to participate in The Benchmark Company’s 13th Annual Discovery One-on-One Investor Conference on December 11, 2024, at the New York Athletic Club in New York City. The company, traded as CSE: BOIL, OTCQB: BEOLF, and Frankfurt: UH9, focuses on mitigating health risks from fried food, cutting operational expenses, reducing waste, and promoting sustainability.

news.headline: Brixmor Property Group (NYSE: BRX) to release Q4 2024 earnings on Feb 10, 2025 after market close, with teleconference on Feb 11, 2025 at 10:00 AM ET.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Brixmor Property Group Inc. revealed its plans to unveil the financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024 on February 10, 2025, after the markets close. The company, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol BRX, is scheduled to conduct a teleconference at 10:00 AM ET on February 11, 2025. This event will provide stakeholders with insights into the financial performance and strategic outlook moving forward.

news.headline: Q32 Bio updates on bempikibart program for alopecia areata, showing improved SALT score in patients.
news.summary: A recent study, SIGNAL-AA, showed promising results for bempikibart in patients with alopecia areata (AA). The study indicated improvements from baseline on the Severity of Alopecia Tool (SALT) score and significant achievement of SALT-20 response. Additionally, findings from the SIGNAL-AD Phase 2a clinical trial in atopic dermatitis also displayed positive outcomes.

news.headline: GameStop reveals Q3 2024 results on Dec. 10, includes GAAP and non-GAAP stats, ended Nov. 2, 2024. Find more info at investor.gamestop.com.
news.summary: In Grapevine, Texas on December 10, 2024, GameStop Corp. (NYSE: GME) disclosed its financial performance for the third quarter concluding on November 2, 2024. The Company's consolidated financial statements, encompassing both GAAP and non-GAAP figures, have been made public. The detailed Form 10-Q and additional information can be accessed at https://investor.gamestop.com.

news.headline: GE Vernova (GEV) raises multi-year financial outlook, starts dividend, buyback program in Investor Update.
news.summary: GE Vernova (NYSE: GEV) held its 2024 Investor Update event in New York, where CEO Scott Strazik discussed the company's multi-year financial outlook and capital allocation strategy. Strazik mentioned the company's strong position in leading the energy transition investment supercycle. GE Vernova is experiencing robust demand for its technologies and services, emphasizing better execution for future growth. The event highlighted significant numbers for investors, showcasing the company's proactive approach to capitalize on the evolving energy landscape.

news.headline: Laura Russell appointed as CFO of Rogers Corporation, effective Dec 10. She served as interim CFO since August. CEO Colin Gouveia praised her leadership qualities.
news.summary: CHANDLER, Arizona - Rogers Corporation (NYSE: ROG) has named Laura Russell as the new Senior Vice President, Chief Financial Officer, and Treasurer, starting from December 10. Colin Gouveia, President and CEO of Rogers, praised Russell's performance as Interim CFO since August, highlighting her exceptional leadership in key finance roles. Her appointment comes as a strategic move to enhance the company's financial management, tapping into her proven expertise and capabilities in the field.

news.headline: PDS Biotech grants 7,000 stock options under Nasdaq rule to new employee in clinical dept, boosting immunotherapy focus.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, PDS Biotechnology Corporation (Nasdaq: PDSB) based in Princeton, NJ, announced it had granted 7,000 nonstatutory stock options to purchase common stock to an employee in the clinical department. This move was made to attract the employee to work for the company, following Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) and PDS Biotech’s 2019 Inducement Plan adopted on June 17, 2019. PDS Biotech focuses on late-stage immunotherapy, aiming to change how the immune system fights and eliminates cancers while also developing vaccines for infectious diseases.

news.headline: Stocks take a breather with Dow falling for the fourth day, ahead of CPI report.
Realty Income increases common stock monthly cash dividend to $0.2640/share from $0.2635/share, 128th consecutive increase.
news.summary: In San Diego on December 10, 2024, Realty Income Corporation (NYSE: O) revealed an uptick in their common stock monthly cash dividend, from $0.2635 per share to $0.2640 per share. Known as The Monthly Dividend Company®, Realty Income announced that the increased dividend is set to be paid out to shareholders soon.

news.headline: Avid Bioservices disclosed Q2 fiscal results for the period ending Oct 31, 2024, showcasing their financial performance.
news.summary: Avid Bioservices, Inc., based in Tustin, California, reported their financial results for the second quarter and six months ending on October 31, 2024. As a prominent biologics contract development and manufacturing organization listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CDMO, they focus on delivering top-notch development and manufacturing services to biotech and pharma firms. Avid Bioservices aims to enhance patient outcomes through their work.

news.headline: Skillsoft reported Q3 fiscal 2025 results: $137M total revenue (down from $139M in prior year), $103M from Talent Development Solutions.
news.summary: In Boston, Skillsoft Corp. (NYSE: SKIL) has shared its financial outcomes for the third quarter of fiscal 2025 ending on October 31, 2024. During this period, the company reported Total Revenue of $137 million, showing a slight decrease from $139 million in the previous year. Revenue specifically from Talent Development Solutions reached $103 million, marking a 2% increase from the previous year. These figures highlight Skillsoft's position as a top platform for innovative learning experiences in the evolving market.

news.headline: Psyence Group settles debts with Nasdaq associate, to receive 337,750 shares at $3.88 each in exchange for discharged obligations.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, Psyence Group Inc (CSE: PSYG) announced entering into an addendum with Psyence Biomedical Ltd (NASDAQ: PBM), a NASDAQ-listed associate. As per the addendum to the Debt Swap Agreements, Psyence Biomedical will issue 337,750 common shares to Psyence Group at a price of US$3.88 per share. This issuance is in exchange for settling the remaining obligations under the Debt Swap Agreements and a promissory note dated January 25, 2024, related to Psyence Biomedical's NASDAQ listing earlier this year.

news.headline: Coastal Financial Corp. plans public offering of common stock, with underwriters able to purchase extra 15% shares.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Coastal Financial Corporation (NASDAQ: CCB) based in Everett, Washington, revealed plans for a public offering of its common stock. The company, acting as the holding entity for Coastal Community Bank, aims to issue shares with no par value. It is anticipated that the underwriters will have a 30-day option to acquire up to 15% additional shares of the Common Stock offered in this public offering, with pricing determined after accounting for underwriting discounts and commissions.

news.headline: Donald Trump is moving quickly with Cabinet picks but facing resistance for Treasury Department decisions.
news.summary: Donald Trump has made swift decisions in selecting his top Cabinet members, with some facing opposition to his approach. The Treasury Department, in particular, is posing a challenge due to Trump's aggressive tactics.

news.headline: Cisco's Katsoudas comments on Trump policy impact; emphasizes need for patience.
There is uncertainty over Trump's Treasury pick; a closer look at the housing market required amidst trade concerns.
news.summary: Over the past two weeks, there has been significant concern regarding the alignment of Donald Trump's anticipated Treasury selection with his stern stance on global trade. Shifting focus, let's delve into a more domestic matter – the housing market.

news.headline: Granite Creek invests in Global Animal Products (GAP) management buyout as part of agribusiness portfolio expansion.
news.summary: Today Granite Creek Capital Partners, L.L.C. revealed their investment to back the management buyout of Global Animal Products (GAP).

news.headline: Consumer confidence rose to a 7-month high in December, with 25% saying it's a good time to make purchases due to anticipated price increases.
news.summary: In December, the University of Michigan’s Consumer Sentiment Index reached a seven-month high, showing better current economic conditions. However, rising concerns about near-term inflation were also evident. Notably, around 25% of respondents, the highest level since 2012, believed it was a good time to make purchases, anticipating further price hikes. The surge in buying sentiment for durable goods caused Current Economic Conditions to jump over 20%. University of Michigan’s Joanne Hsu suggested that the rise in durable goods purchases was driven by a desire to avoid future price increases. This data indicates a mixture of optimism and caution among consumers.

news.headline: November jobs report suggests labor market reacceleration, raising doubts about Dec. 18 Fed rate cut.
news.summary: The latest report on November jobs suggests a revitalization of the labor market, raising concerns about the potential for a Federal Reserve rate cut on December 18. This development could cast doubt on the expected monetary policy decision. The S&P 500 index appears stable amidst this uncertainty, indicating a level of confidence in the market.

news.headline: Trump continues to focus on tariffs, with no break over Thanksgiving.
news.summary: President-elect Donald Trump continued to express a strong interest in tariffs even during the Thanksgiving holiday, highlighting his ongoing focus on trade policies.

news.headline: Willowdale Asset Management launches as real estate asset manager overseeing 7 businesses, with $5 billion in assets.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Willowdale Asset Management, which was previously the corporate branch of Empire Communities, has officially unveiled its inception as a diversified real estate asset manager. Situated in Toronto, Ontario, Willowdale originated in 1993 and has progressed from a singular-project homebuilder to a multifaceted, vertically integrated real estate asset manager. The company now supervises seven distinct enterprises in the sector and maintains a portfolio exceeding $5 billion in assets under management throughout North America.

news.headline: Silicon Valley lobbying boosts Republican banking priority for Trump's second term resurgence.
news.summary: Prominent figures in Silicon Valley are actively advocating for a Republican initiative on bank regulations, bringing renewed attention to the issue. This push has gained momentum and is expected to make a strong resurgence in the second term of the Trump administration.

news.headline: Cake secures $13MM in seed funding led by Gradient, aiming to democratize AI for mid-market businesses.
news.summary: Cake, a platform for managed open-source AI infrastructure, has revealed that it secured $13 million in funding to provide advanced AI technology to the mid-market.

news.headline: American stock futures and bond yields fall due to reports of Putin's updated nuclear doctrine.
Ancora supports Amcor's $8.4B acquisition of Berry, an activist investor report reveals.
Empire Continental Land rebrands to Precedent Land Co under Willowdale Asset Mgmt in Vaughan, ON. (Dec 02, 2024)
news.summary: On December 02, 2024, in Vaughan, Ontario, Empire Continental Land rebranded itself as Precedent Land Company. This division, previously part of Empire Communities, is now an independent entity under Willowdale Asset Management. The transition signifies a new chapter for the company as it establishes itself in the market.

news.headline: Trump chooses experienced individuals for key roles in his administration, avoiding unconventional picks.
news.summary: The President-elect, Donald Trump, has opted for traditional choices for his economic team, selecting individuals with experience in Wall Street or established Republicans for important positions in his administration.
